name: garuda-ui-plugin
description: Modular AI pipeline for Capillary Loyalty Frontend (garuda-ui). PRD → HLD → LLD → Code → Tests → Visual QA → PR. Design-first with a 4-file Figma cache, per-EXACT drilling, and 132 Cap UI Library specs. Each stage is its own slash command; a thin /run-pipeline wrapper composes them end-to-end.
author: Capillary Frontend Team

base.note: garuda-ui-claude-plugin is preserved verbatim. Enhancements are additive: new flags on existing commands, new files alongside existing ones. No destructive edits to inherited assets.

features.modular_commands: Per-stage slash commands compose into a pipeline — no monolithic orchestrator
features.run_pipeline_wrapper: /run-pipeline chains all stages end-to-end with gate-halt semantics; resumable by running the failed stage directly
features.prd_clarity_flow: /clarify-prd + /filter-prd — two-step PRD clarification with PM-friendly Q&A across 5 gap categories (Design, Spec Gap, Backend, Rules, Architecture)
features.hld_generation: Five skills compose the HLD (prd-parser, prototype-analyser, api-contract-builder, architecture-aligner, hld-writer) with explicit [ASSUMED] markers on unconfirmed contracts
features.lld_generation: /generate-lld produces 10-file organism anatomy + Redux shape + saga flow from the HLD, reducing re-derivation cost in codegen
features.testcase_generation: /generate-testcases produces a P0/P1/P2 test case sheet before code is written
features.figma_cache_strategy: 4-file per-node cache (recipe.json + prop-spec-notes.json + metadata.xml + design-context.jsx) with Level A/B validation gates and per-EXACT child drilling when metadata-only responses are detected
features.hld_to_code_pipeline: 11-phase codegen with Phase 2.5 structure-preview gate and per-file resume via build-log.jsonl
features.build_verification: /build-verify runs npm start, parses errors, and applies up to 3 auto-fix attempts
features.test_writing: /write-tests generates reducer/saga/component tests targeting ≥85% coverage; uses redux-saga-test-plan and test-utils wrappers
features.test_evaluation: /test-eval runs Jest coverage and gates on the threshold from skills/config.md
features.visual_qa_dual_mode: /visual-qa supports user-driven mode (default, 5 iterations with approve/exclude/feedback controls) and --auto-fix mode (unattended, 3 iterations, Cap* tokens only)
features.pr_generation: /create-pr assembles PR body from HLD + LLD + build-report + test-report + visual-qa-report and runs gh pr create
features.architect_self_refresh: /architect-scan --refresh performs a diff-based re-scan of changed files; --verify does a lightweight drift check; --auto runs verify and re-scans only if drift exceeds the threshold in skills/config.md
features.cap_ui_library_specs: 132 component specs indexed by skills/cap-ui-library/_index.md so agents look up the one spec they need rather than loading all 132
features.coding_dna: Six pillars (architecture, components, quality, state-and-api, styling, testing) as advisory reference alongside the authoritative GUIDELINES.md
features.fe_guardrails: FG-01 through FG-12 guardrails evaluated inline during codegen Phase 8
features.schema_validation: New post-dev agents (lld-generator, testcase-generator, build-verifier, test-writer, test-evaluator, guardrail-checker, productex-verifier, pr-writer) validate their output against JSON schemas in .claude/schemas/ and hard-halt on failure
features.shared_rules: skills/shared-rules.md — single source of truth for organism anatomy, ImmutableJS patterns, saga error handling, Cap* imports, test-utils conventions
features.config: skills/config.md — centralized configurable values (coverage threshold 85%, architect drift threshold 20 files, dev port, URL prefix, retry limits, chunk sizes)

not_included.gix_orchestrator: cap-garuda-plugin /gix monolithic orchestrator — replaced by modular commands + /run-pipeline
not_included.cross_repo_tracer: deferred to v1.1 as an opt-in flag
not_included.session_bloat: session_memory.md, approach_log.md, requirements_context.md, session_journal.md, pipeline_state.json — artifacts themselves are the audit trail
not_included.live_dashboard: live-dashboard.html — demo-ware with no verification value
not_included.confluence_auto_publish: replaced by explicit /publish-confluence <artifact> — no implicit publish on every phase
not_included.per_phase_mermaid: Mermaid diagrams kept only in LLD, not on every phase
not_included.tutor_debug_knowledge_bank: out of scope for the build pipeline
